issues.details: Block content models are type labels only (no row/cell structure): ['hero', 'columns', 'carousel', 'before-after', 'tabs', 'accordion', 'cards', 'clinic-finder', 'topic-menu', 'fragment']
issues.remediation: Content models should include row/cell authoring structure per Davids Model. The block-inventory contentPatternMapping has detailed models that could be referenced.

evidence.render_strategy: JSON structural comparison, no rendering needed
evidence.finding: All 14 manifest pages mapped to archetypes in blueprint. 6 archetypes (homepage, treatment-page, faq, clinic-finder, contact, legal) all have >=1 section defined. 10 content blocks in palette matching all 10 non-chrome local blocks. 3 fragments (treatment-tabs, clinic-finder-cta, pharma-notice) with paths defined. Chrome (nav=/nav, footer=/footer) fully modelled in globalElements with section structure.

evidence.render_strategy: Structural count verification against source-bundle page inventory
evidence.finding: homepage=7 sections, treatment-page=10 sections, faq=8 sections, clinic-finder=2 sections, contact=3 sections, legal=1 section. Each archetype uses sequences with typed entries (block or default-content). Section styles reused consistently: 'highlight' for benefits, 'references' for footnotes, 'pharma-notice' for disclaimers, 'scroll-reveal' for brand intro.
14/14 manifest pages mapped. Distribution: 1 homepage redirect, 1 homepage, 5 treatment-page, 1 faq, 3 clinic-finder, 1 contact, 2 legal. Root URL (juvederm.nl) correctly noted as redirect to /nl.

evidence.render_strategy: Structural comparison of chrome source vs blueprint model
evidence.finding: Navigation modelled with 4 sections (brand-bar, primary-nav, faq-dropdown, cta). Footer modelled with 3 sections (footer-nav with accordion, legal-bar, social-copyright). Both have EDS paths (/nav, /footer). Chrome source HTML files exist in source-bundle.

summary: Blueprint PASS: 14 pages mapped to 6 archetypes, 10 content blocks in palette, 3 fragments with paths, chrome fully modelled. 1 medium issue: content models lack detailed row/cell structure.
